title: HRRRMP
description: A well balanced horror modpack for minecraft. With scrimmers, backpacks and even aliens. And you'll find out the rest later...
body:
# 👻 HRRRMP - Horror ModPack I'll start at the beginning. This modpack is well balanced in terms of monsters. Most of them can be killed, and if you can not, they certainly will not kill you. Epic Fight mod and a bunch of new weapons will provide you with interesting pvp, and Additional Structures mod will add interest in exploring the world. Simple Voice Chat will provide you with a fun adventure with friends, and Sound Physics will add atmosphere to the mines (compatible with Simple Voice Chat). **Resource packs, Shaders and configs are already in the modpack file so you don't have to do anything!** ### You can download Optifine for optimization
Mods From CurseForge - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advancement-plaques](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advancement-plaques) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carry-on](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carry-on) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dark-mode-everywhere](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dark-mode-everywhere) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeonsenhanced](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeonsenhanced) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/treechop](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/treechop) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/itemphysic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/itemphysic) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waystones](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waystones) - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horror-elements-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horror-elements-mod)
